description: A new AES67/SMPTE-2110 IP audio network is being deployed. The broadcast engineering team has provided a specification document at ~/Desktop/aoip_template_spec.txt containing details for specialized Audio-over-IP (AoIP) equipment. Read the specification and create two custom Device Templates in ManageEngine OpManager so this equipment is correctly identified during discovery. You must navigate to Settings > Configuration > Device Templates (or similar), create the templates, and map them exactly to the provided System OIDs. Credentials: admin/Admin@123 at http://localhost:8060.
